Compatibility hub

FAAC compatible gate remotes

FAAC gate automation receivers and rolling-code remotes

Compatibility checks

Frequency
433.92MHz and 868MHz variants
Validation note
Match the receiver family and rolling-code protocol, not only the handset shell.

Wholesale workflow

  1. Send receiver label photos, original remote front and back photos, and required quantity.
  2. Confirm frequency, coding type, channel count, and learn-button procedure.
  3. Test samples before bulk production when the receiver generation is unclear.
Ask for matching support Read compatibility guide
